gaps: synthesize.sh:55-68 health gate silently skipped on first run when score-cache.json doesn't exist yet

strengths: Health gate enforced in BOTH score.sh:619-621,708-709 AND synthesize.sh:55-68 with actionable error messages

scoring.evidence: Health gate now enforced in both score.sh and synthesize.sh. Multi-sample median, four output modes, integrity checks all working. Remaining gaps: first-run edge case, score buried in output, three YAML parsers.

gaps: experiment-learnings.md never pruned or promoted by system — consolidate_knowledge() only appends (bin/lib/grade-consolidation.sh:8-129)
session_start.sh:531 consolidation hint is a prompt, not enforcement — Claude may ignore it
Wrong predictions don't block /plan from re-proposing failed approaches
trail.sh is read-only visualization with no downstream consumers
Prediction quality gate warns about vague predictions but doesn't prevent grading
strengths: Auto-grading on session start with before/after diff and wrong-prediction surfacing (session_start.sh:154-186)
grade.sh has 5-tier claim parsing plus 3 signal-based fallbacks
consolidate_knowledge() now runs after every grade.sh invocation (grade.sh:334)
Atomic writes throughout — grade.sh uses mktemp+mv pattern
self.sh Learn section has 7 checks covering velocity, grading rate, freshness, trend, loop closure
learning.evidence: Core gap 'consolidator only runs from /retro' now addressed: consolidate_knowledge() runs after every grade, session_start.sh prompts semantic consolidation. Auto-grade-on-boot pipeline works. Loop still doesn't fully close: knowledge appended but never pruned, wrong predictions warn but don't gate.

gaps: No runtime output evidence — skill definitions are instructions to Claude, actual output consistency untested
Output templates indirected to reference.md instead of inline (skills/plan/SKILL.md:159, skills/go/SKILL.md:182)
Overlap between /ideate [feature] and /feature [name] ideate — two paths to same goal
Preamble shell commands fail silently when jq missing or JSON malformed (all 12 SKILL.md preambles)
cli-taste.sh uses eval on user-provided command with no sanitization (skills/taste/scripts/cli-taste.sh:16)
strengths: Intent routing is real and differentiated — 6-13 modes per skill with genuinely different behavior
State awareness is deep — each skill reads 7-14 state files in parallel
Tier-aware behavior changes actual recommendations across 5 maturity tiers
Cross-skill routing graph is explicit — every skill declares reads/writes/triggers/triggered-by
First-run handling in every skill with graceful degradation
Anti-sycophancy is structural — banned phrases, move count limits, specific guardrails
Agent wiring is precise — named agents, model tiers, turn limits, cost notes
commands.evidence: Previous score of 30 was a pipeline failure, not code quality assessment. 15 SKILL.md files are well-structured with differentiated routing, deep state awareness, tier-aware behavior, cross-skill integration, and structural anti-sycophancy. Consistent design system across all skills without being template-slop. 88% human-quality.

install.evidence: Three targeted changes close worst gaps: dead end after install gone (README.md:18, install.sh:394), command dump replaced with intent-based decision guide (README.md:118-121). install.sh infrastructure solid: idempotent symlinks, dependency checks, dual-mode, self-test.

todo.evidence: Working persistent backlog with locking, atomic writes, smart promote, auto-tag, health diagnostics. Previous eval scored based on truncated code read — implementations exist and are substantial. Real gaps: done_count tracking, colon-in-value parsing, meta-task delegation to Claude.
